subject: Kingship Christian Centre
value: Religious worship and other religious community outreach activities.

value.content: Campus, purpose, youth or family content
Live prayer three to five times per week

responsibilities: Source artists for concerts and choir
Source speakers for Thrive In Two
Promote events, artists, albums and singles

subject: Open Hands Outreach
value: Kingship Christian Centre's giving and practical-compassion programme for community support, social outreach and accountable impact.

value.main_hall: Approximately 120–200 square metres with around 150 seats, acoustic treatment and intentional lighting

subject: Kingship Worship Auditions
value: Online auditions are open for vocalists, instrumentalists, songwriters, producers, sound engineers, photographers, videographers and media or design contributors.

source.conversation_topic: Kingship Worship auditions website and poster campaign

subject: Kingship Worship Auditions
value: Applicants submit a short worship-focused video, preferably 60–90 seconds, by direct upload or a private Google Drive, YouTube Unlisted or Dropbox link.

subject: Kingship Christian Centre website
value: Store events in Google Sheets and publish them to the website through Apps Script or JSON so website events update from the spreadsheet rather than manual page edits.

subject: Kingship Christian Centre app
value: A minimalistic church app centred on events, sermons or media, prayer, giving, ministry information and practical member engagement without unnecessary clutter.

subject: Kingship Music Production
value: Develop, record, release and promote Kingdom-centred music, artists and worship projects with professional production and distribution standards.

subject: Thrive In Two
value: Marriage and relationship support through biblical guidance, counselling-style intake, courses, workshops, referrals and carefully controlled pastoral-care records.

source.conversation_topic: Thrive In Two planning and database implementation

value.status: SARS Income Tax registration notice received
value.public_repository_rule: The taxpayer reference number and private registered-address information are stored only in secure compliance records, not in Mandla Brain.
value.provisional_tax: The SARS notice indicates provisional-tax obligations from the 2027 tax period; exact returns and dates must be confirmed on eFiling.

value.pbo: Not approved; application pack prepared but not submitted in the recorded state
value.control_rule: Do not advertise donations as tax deductible or issue section 18A receipts before written SARS approval that covers the relevant activity.
value.activity_assessment: Religious activities may support PBO approval, while section 18A must be requested only for specifically qualifying activities such as properly defined relief or educational work.

value.working_assumption: The NPC without members is likely a non-affected company without beneficial ownership to declare beyond the required director control or interest register.
value.not_final: This is not a legal or factual conclusion until the directors complete the classification questionnaire.
value.stop_condition: If any founder, donor, family member, outside ministry, sponsor, nominee or other natural person has appointment rights, veto rights, decisive influence, economic benefit or indirect control, use the applicable beneficial-owner filing route instead of the simplified no-beneficial-owner route.

subject: Kingship Christian Centre CIPC annual return

requirements: Confirm the exact CIPC portal filing window and fee
Prepare approved turnover and financial information
Confirm audited AFS, independently reviewed AFS or Financial Accountability Supplement route
Save the annual-return certificate, payment proof and updated disclosure certificate

source.conversation_topic: CIPC annual return and financial reporting pack

subject: Kingship Christian Centre compliance records
value: Mandla Brain may record compliance status, workflows, folder names and non-sensitive company facts, but must never store taxpayer reference numbers, identity or passport numbers, private residential addresses, banking details, eFiling credentials, donor data or signed private compliance documents. Those remain in restricted Google Drive folders or official portals.

source.conversation_topic: Mandla Brain security rules applied to Kingship compliance update
